Hi, Priyantha.
Welcome to Google on your new PC.
Here are a few tips to get you started.

Maximize human productivity


 
Hey, Priyantha!

Curious about how to get the most out of ClickUp and discover what Super Agents can do for you?

Join our Beginner Webinar built for new ClickUp users. We'll walk you through Workspace setup, task organization, and introduce you to Super Agents—your most intelligent teammates yet.
 
MAR
10
	
ClickUp Beginner Webinar + Super Agents Discovery
30 min


	Tuesday, March 10th, 2026
10:00–10:30 AM (PST)


Sign me up

 
Ultimate beginner's guide
 
	Structure your work for clarity and focus
	Organize tasks, meetings, and priorities
	Discover where Super Agents add value
	Tips for effective tasks, collaboration, and tracking
 
You’ll leave knowing exactly what Super Agents are, where they fit, and why they’re worth using—plus foundational ClickUp skills for success.
 
Count me in

 
If you'd rather not receive this kind of email, you can Unsubscribe or manage your email preferences.
© 2026 ClickUp / 350 Tenth Ave. Suite 500, San Diego, CA 92101 / Privacy Policy
